title: justicia addisoniensis
intro: Justicia addisoniensis, also known as Addisison's justicia, is a flowering plant species native to Sri Lanka. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia addisoniensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Herbal preparations of Justicia addisoniensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying the leaves to make a powder that can be consumed as a supplement.
